title: Bimmisaari tiga loreng

The '''tiga loreng''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] beaked [[Bird/Legends|bird]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]]<ref name="PM" /> from the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The [[Bimm/Legends|native]] [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|inhabitants]] of Bimmisaari banned all weapons of violence and [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] on their homeworld, ensuring that tiga loreng thrived in the wild. Much of the planet's surface was covered with thick forests of [[Asaari tree|asaari trees]], whose leafy fronds constantly moved in response to stimuli,<ref name="PM" /> even when no wind was blowing.<ref name="HES">''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> Flocks of brightly colored tiga loreng nest in the mobile branches, much like [[dartfish]] among [[Ocean/Legends|sea]] anemones.<ref name="PM" />
